requirement_topic.en: EMC — Emission for Lighting Equipment (SAZ / ZWS adopting CISPR 15 / IEC 60598-context)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——照明设备发射（SAZ / ZWS 采纳 CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容——照明設備發射（SAZ / ZWS 採納 CISPR 15）

summary.en: LED luminaires for Zimbabwe are expected to control radio-frequency emissions in line with CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which SAZ commonly adopts as a ZWS standard, frequently aligned with the SANS adoption. CISPR 15 governs conducted and radiated emission limits for lighting equipment. Unlike the EU, Zimbabwe does not operate a single horizontal EMC Directive with self-declaration; instead EMC performance is demonstrated via the adopted ZWS / IEC-CISPR test report, and may be assessed as part of SAZ conformity assessment or import inspection where the product category is regulated. For wireless / smart luminaires, separate radio type approval through POTRAZ also applies (see ledzw-emc-02).
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯具应按 CISPR 15（电气照明和类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）控制射频发射；SAZ 通常将其采纳为 ZWS 标准，并常与 SANS 采纳保持一致。CISPR 15 规定照明设备的传导和辐射发射限值。与欧盟不同，津巴布韦不实行单一横向 EMC 指令加自我声明；EMC 性能通过所采纳的 ZWS / IEC-CISPR 检测报告予以证明，并在受监管产品类别下可作为 SAZ 合格评定或进口检验的一部分进行评估。对于无线/智能灯具，另须通过 POTRAZ 进行无线电型号核准（见 ledzw-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈具應按 CISPR 15（電氣照明和類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）控制射頻發射；SAZ 通常將其採納為 ZWS 標準，並常與 SANS 採納保持一致。CISPR 15 規定照明設備的傳導和輻射發射限值。與歐盟不同，辛巴威不實行單一橫向 EMC 指令加自我聲明；EMC 性能通過所採納的 ZWS / IEC-CISPR 檢測報告予以證明，並在受監管產品類別下可作為 SAZ 合格評定或進口檢驗的一部分進行評估。對於無線/智能燈具，另須通過 POTRAZ 進行無線電型號核准（見 ledzw-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 / IEC — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (adopted by SAZ as a ZWS standard; often SANS-aligned)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — conformity assessment / import inspection

summary.en: China's equivalent emission standard for lighting equipment is GB/T 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), aligned with CISPR 15, together with GB 17625.1 for harmonic current emissions. EMC testing is part of CCC for in-scope luminaires. The CISPR base is shared with Zimbabwe's adopted ZWS standard, but Chinese GB/T 17743 reports and CCC certificates are not recognised by SAZ.
summary.zh: 中国对应的照明设备发射标准为 GB/T 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），与 CISPR 15 对齐，并由 GB 17625.1 补充谐波电流发射要求。EMC 检测是范围内灯具 CCC 的一部分。CISPR 基础与津巴布韦采纳的 ZWS 标准相同，但中国 GB/T 17743 报告及 CCC 证书不被 SAZ 认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應的照明設備發射標準為 GB/T 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），與 CISPR 15 對齊，並由 GB 17625.1 補充諧波電流發射要求。EMC 檢測是範圍內燈具 CCC 的一部分。CISPR 基礎與辛巴威採納的 ZWS 標準相同，但中國 GB/T 17743 報告及 CCC 證書不被 SAZ 認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC, aligned with CISPR 15)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions

gap.en: China GB/T 17743 and Zimbabwe's adopted CISPR 15-based ZWS standard share the same CISPR base, so emission limits are largely aligned. Practical gaps: (1) CN CCC certificates and GB test reports are not accepted by SAZ — an EMC report against the ZWS / CISPR 15 edition from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab is advisable; (2) tests should be performed at the 230 V / 50 Hz operating point; (3) EMC is assessed within SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection where the category is regulated, not via an EU-style self-declared EMC Directive. Immunity (IEC 61547) may also be requested by customers though emission is the primary lighting EMC concern.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 17743 与津巴布韦采纳的基于 CISPR 15 的 ZWS 标准同以 CISPR 为基础，发射限值基本对齐。实际差距：（1）中国 CCC 证书及 GB 检测报告不被 SAZ 接受——建议提供 ILAC MRA 认可实验室按 ZWS / CISPR 15 版本出具的 EMC 报告；（2）检测应在 230 V / 50 Hz 工作点进行；（3）在受监管类别下，EMC 在 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验中评估，而非通过欧盟式自我声明的 EMC 指令。客户也可能要求抗扰度（IEC 61547），但发射是照明 EMC 的主要关注点。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 17743 與辛巴威採納的基於 CISPR 15 的 ZWS 標準同以 CISPR 為基礎，發射限值基本對齊。實際差距：（1）中國 CCC 證書及 GB 檢測報告不被 SAZ 接受——建議提供 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室按 ZWS / CISPR 15 版本出具的 EMC 報告；（2）檢測應在 230 V / 50 Hz 工作點進行；（3）在受監管類別下，EMC 在 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗中評估，而非通過歐盟式自我聲明的 EMC 指令。客戶也可能要求抗擾度（IEC 61547），但發射是照明 EMC 的主要關注點。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — emission conformity to CISPR 15 (ZWS-adopted) expected; assessed within SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection where the luminaire category is regulated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC (GB/T 17743 + GB 17625.1) forms part of CCC for in-scope luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires for Zimbabwe should demonstrate CISPR 15 emission conformity via a ZWS / IEC-based test report, run at 230 V / 50 Hz. Chinese GB/T 17743 reports and CCC certificates are not accepted by SAZ. EMC is evaluated within SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection where the product category is regulated; there is no EU-style self-declared EMC Directive in Zimbabwe.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯具应通过基于 ZWS / IEC 的检测报告证明 CISPR 15 发射符合性，并在 230 V / 50 Hz 下进行。中国 GB/T 17743 报告及 CCC 证书不被 SAZ 接受。在受监管产品类别下，EMC 在 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验中评估；津巴布韦不存在欧盟式自我声明的 EMC 指令。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈具應通過基於 ZWS / IEC 的檢測報告證明 CISPR 15 發射符合性，並在 230 V / 50 Hz 下進行。中國 GB/T 17743 報告及 CCC 證書不被 SAZ 接受。在受監管產品類別下，EMC 在 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗中評估；辛巴威不存在歐盟式自我聲明的 EMC 指令。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires (POTRAZ)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的无线电型号核准（POTRAZ）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的無線電型號核准（POTRAZ）

summary.en: Smart or wireless-enabled LED luminaires (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF) intended for Zimbabwe require radio type approval / equipment authorisation from POTRAZ (Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe) before importation and sale. POTRAZ regulates the use of the radio-frequency spectrum and authorises radiocommunication equipment placed on the Zimbabwe market. Type approval typically requires technical documentation and RF test reports (e.g. to relevant ETSI / IEC / FCC-equivalent RF and SAR/EMF parameters) demonstrating the radio module operates within the frequency bands and power limits permitted in Zimbabwe. This is separate from, and additional to, the SAZ / ZWS product-safety and CISPR 15 emission requirements; a purely RF-passive luminaire does not trigger POTRAZ approval.
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的智能或无线 LED 灯具（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频）在进口及销售前须取得 POTRAZ（津巴布韦邮政和电信监管局）的无线电型号核准/设备授权。POTRAZ 监管无线电频谱使用并对投放津巴布韦市场的无线电通信设备进行授权。型号核准通常须提交技术文件及射频检测报告（如依据相关 ETSI / IEC / FCC 等效的射频及 SAR/EMF 参数），证明无线电模块在津巴布韦许可的频段及功率限值内运行。此项与 SAZ / ZWS 产品安全及 CISPR 15 发射要求分立且为额外要求；纯射频无源灯具不触发 POTRAZ 核准。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的智能或無線 LED 燈具（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻）在進口及銷售前須取得 POTRAZ（辛巴威郵政和電信監管局）的無線電型號核准/設備授權。POTRAZ 監管無線電頻譜使用並對投放辛巴威市場的無線電通信設備進行授權。型號核准通常須提交技術文件及射頻檢測報告（如依據相關 ETSI / IEC / FCC 等效的射頻及 SAR/EMF 參數），證明無線電模塊在辛巴威許可的頻段及功率限值內運行。此項與 SAZ / ZWS 產品安全及 CISPR 15 發射要求分立且為額外要求；純射頻無源燈具不觸發 POTRAZ 核准。

standards_or_laws: POTRAZ (Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe) — radio equipment type approval / authorisation
Postal and Telecommunications Act (Zimbabwe) — spectrum and radiocommunication equipment regulation

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission, administered under MIIT) type approval, which authorises the radio module's frequency, power, and spurious-emission characteristics for the Chinese market. Type-approved radio modules carry an SRRC/CMIIT ID. SRRC approval is specific to China's spectrum allocation and is not recognised by POTRAZ — a separate Zimbabwe authorisation is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线功能灯具须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，归口工信部 MIIT）型号核准，对无线电模块的频率、功率及杂散发射特性进行中国市场授权。型号核准的无线电模块带有 SRRC/CMIIT ID。SRRC 核准针对中国的频谱划分，不被 POTRAZ 认可——须另行取得津巴布韦授权。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線功能燈具須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，歸口工信部 MIIT）型號核准，對無線電模塊的頻率、功率及雜散發射特性進行中國市場授權。型號核准的無線電模塊帶有 SRRC/CMIIT ID。SRRC 核准針對中國的頻譜劃分，不被 POTRAZ 認可——須另行取得辛巴威授權。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (State Radio Regulation Commission / MIIT) — required for wireless-enabled equipment in China
CMIIT ID marking — radio type-approval identifier in China

gap.en: POTRAZ radio type approval is a Zimbabwe-specific authorisation with no mutual recognition of China's SRRC approval. For smart / wireless luminaires the manufacturer or importer must: (1) submit RF technical documentation and test reports demonstrating the module operates within Zimbabwe-permitted bands and power limits; (2) obtain POTRAZ authorisation before importation; (3) ensure the in-country importer handles the local filing, as POTRAZ approval is typically tied to a Zimbabwe entity. SRRC/CMIIT ID evidence from China speeds preparation but does not substitute for POTRAZ approval. A non-wireless luminaire is out of POTRAZ scope and only needs the SAZ / ZWS safety and CISPR 15 emission route.
gap.zh: POTRAZ 无线电型号核准是津巴布韦特有授权，与中国 SRRC 核准无互认。对于智能/无线灯具，制造商或进口商须：（1）提交射频技术文件及检测报告，证明模块在津巴布韦许可频段及功率限值内运行；（2）在进口前取得 POTRAZ 授权；（3）确保由在地进口商办理本地备案，因 POTRAZ 核准通常与津巴布韦实体绑定。中国 SRRC/CMIIT ID 证据可加快准备，但不能替代 POTRAZ 核准。非无线灯具不在 POTRAZ 范围，仅需 SAZ / ZWS 安全及 CISPR 15 发射路径。
gap.zht: POTRAZ 無線電型號核准是辛巴威特有授權，與中國 SRRC 核准無互認。對於智能/無線燈具，製造商或進口商須：（1）提交射頻技術文件及檢測報告，證明模塊在辛巴威許可頻段及功率限值內運行；（2）在進口前取得 POTRAZ 授權；（3）確保由在地進口商辦理本地備案，因 POTRAZ 核准通常與辛巴威實體綁定。中國 SRRC/CMIIT ID 證據可加快準備，但不能替代 POTRAZ 核准。非無線燈具不在 POTRAZ 範圍，僅需 SAZ / ZWS 安全及 CISPR 15 發射路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for wireless products) — POTRAZ radio type approval required before importation and sale of smart / wireless-enabled luminaires; not applicable to non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for wireless products) — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled equipment in China; not applicable to non-wireless luminaires

source.publisher: Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe (POTRAZ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart / wireless LED luminaires for Zimbabwe require POTRAZ radio type approval before import and sale, in addition to SAZ / ZWS safety and CISPR 15 emission requirements. China's SRRC/CMIIT approval is not recognised by POTRAZ — a separate Zimbabwe authorisation, usually filed through the in-country importer, is required. Non-wireless luminaires are outside POTRAZ scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的智能/无线 LED 灯具在进口及销售前须取得 POTRAZ 无线电型号核准，此外还须满足 SAZ / ZWS 安全及 CISPR 15 发射要求。中国 SRRC/CMIIT 核准不被 POTRAZ 认可——须另行取得津巴布韦授权，通常由在地进口商备案。非无线灯具不在 POTRAZ 范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的智能/無線 LED 燈具在進口及銷售前須取得 POTRAZ 無線電型號核准，此外還須滿足 SAZ / ZWS 安全及 CISPR 15 發射要求。中國 SRRC/CMIIT 核准不被 POTRAZ 認可——須另行取得辛巴威授權，通常由在地進口商備案。非無線燈具不在 POTRAZ 範圍。
